name: adeu_selector_vs_pytest_testmon_v0_pilot
description: Smaller honest pilot corpus for local A/B benchmark of ADEU selector against pytest-testmon across benchmark target trees.

deltas.expected_blast_radius_intuition: package-local source change should be judged against the full edge-ledger test tree
deltas.target_scope_note: entire package test tree for packages/adeu_edge_ledger
deltas.notes: Real git-derived narrow package-local delta with a small complete owner test tree.

deltas.expected_blast_radius_intuition: app-level script change should be judged against the full apps/api test tree, not a single coupled file
deltas.target_scope_note: entire app test tree for apps/api
deltas.notes: Real git-derived app-level delta with a broad owner-local benchmark target tree.

deltas.expected_blast_radius_intuition: repo_description fixture and intent-matrix hardening should be judged against the full repo_description package test tree
deltas.target_scope_note: entire package test tree for packages/adeu_repo_description
deltas.notes: Real git-derived repo_description delta with artifact-driven reach.

deltas.expected_blast_radius_intuition: single-package schema constant corruption should create a failing owner-local ground truth
deltas.target_scope_note: entire package test tree for packages/adeu_edge_ledger
